witness_prompts: Where do you notice {frame_1} and {frame_2} in the scene?
What kind of turn happens at '{threshold_1}'?
Which action feels weighty but not fully explained?
How does the passage ask you to stay present with {movement_1}?
What would it mean to witness this moment without rushing?
prayer_frames: God who speaks through the text, draw near.
Give us patience to witness well.
safety_notes_append: Keep the witness grounded in the passage language.
